rows.label: tev057001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev057001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nio about the weather in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev057001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nio about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Weather in Cauldros
can get REALLY nasty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0002
rows.name:
In daytime, you get rain—and not water rain
either! It rain FIRE! And just when Nio think
life is going to end in burning armageddon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Then night fall and sparkling
energy mist comes! Mist make
dark creatures waaay stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Nio have to take Popo and wait
night out in caves more times
than Nio care to count.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0005
rows.name:
If traveler friend is planning on going
there, friend better scope out good place
to hide in case weather turns all scary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0008
rows.name:
Normally Nio makes living selling things
out of Drongo Caravan in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0009
rows.name:
But just look at this place! Has
friend ever seen anywhere so white
and shiny and breathtaking?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Popo, girl of Nio, really like it here,
so we visit often as lovebird couple.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Nio have vacation time
built up, so here we are![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Say, did friend see wedding dress for
sale at that shop over there? So pretty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0013
rows.name:
*sigh* Nio cannot wait for day
when Popo wears lovely dress
and Nio gets to marry her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nio about the weather in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Nio about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0018
rows.name: Friend must already know this, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0019
rows.name:
When spores come out, it can be
really hard to see what is going on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0020
rows.name:
And at night, red aurora come out. Popo
like red aurora because of sexy romance
factor, but friend should watch out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0021
rows.name:
Aurora flashing irritates eyes and
makes it hard to aim at enemies from
distance. Total pain in tuft![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0014
rows.name:
Nio still cannot believe that friend
had ring after all this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Nio feels a bit silly for kvetching so
much, but all is well that endings well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0016
rows.name:
From now on, Nio going to work
extra hard at Drongo Caravan
to give Popo happy life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057001_MSG0017
rows.name:
But not TOO hard! Nio know better than to
overextend self. Nio going to set time aside
and shower Popo with love Popo deserve![ST:wait ]
